# terrible_community_general_bitbucket_pipeline_variable (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) The pipeline variable name.
- `repository` (String) The repository name.
- `state` (String) Indicates desired state of the variable.
- `workspace` (String) The repository owner. **Note:** `ignore:username` used to be an alias of this option. Since community.general 6.0.0 it is an alias of `user`.

### Optional

- `secured` (Boolean) Whether to encrypt the variable value.
- `value` (String) The pipeline variable value.
